title: Create Board via Template in Folder - Workflow

posts.author: Leahgracers (Leah J)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I’d like to utilize the ‘Create from Template’ feature within a Workflow, but there is currently no option to select a destination folder to create the board inside of.

This option appears to only be available within a standard board automation under ‘Advanced’.

What are you trying to achieve

Within a workflow, create a board from template inside of a specific folder in a workspace.
